package rulecoverage

func PositiveXmlDecoderWithoutStrict() string {
    ruleID := "xml_decoder_without_strict"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`xml.NewDecoder(r)` without setting `Strict = false` when processing trusted XML"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
